title: Colorful Bricks
description: Dyable bricks, new crafting recipies, more coming soon
body:
Features
=========
---
## Items
- Added the 'brick' item in all colors (`colorfulbricks:<color>_brick`)
- Added the 'bricks' block in all colors (`colorfulbricks:<color>_bricks`)
- Added a creative tab called 'Colorful Bricks' for all mod items/blocks
- Renamed 'Brick' to 'Brown Brick'
- Renamed 'Bricks' to 'Brown Bricks'
## Crafting
- Added a recipe for every 'brick' item ('brick' + dye)
- Added a recipe for every 'brick' item (1 'bricks' => 4 'brick's)
- Added a recipe for every 'bricks' block ('bricks' + dye)
- Added a crafting recipe for green dye (blue dye + yellow dye)
- Added color mixing for the brick ITEM


             - blue + green = cyan

             - black + white = gray

             - blue + white = lightblue

             - green + white = lime

             - blue + yellow = green

             - red + yellow = orange

             - red + white = pink

             - blue + red = purple

             - gray + white = lightgray

             - pink + purple = magenta
